education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

bullet_points.text: Architected and implemented microservices platform using FastAPI, Docker, and Kubernetes, reducing deployment time by 65% and supporting 50,000+ concurrent users
Led cross-functional team of 8 engineers to migrate legacy monolith to event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka and Redis, resulting in 40% improvement in system responsiveness
Developed automated testing framework with Jest and Pytest, achieving 95% code coverage and reducing production bugs by 80%
Optimized database queries and implemented caching strategies with Redis, decreasing API response times from 2.1s to 180ms
Built real-time data processing pipeline using Apache Spark and Python, handling 2M+ events per hour with 99.9% uptime
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs serving ML model predictions to 10,000+ daily active users with sub-200ms latency
Created comprehensive monitoring and alerting system using Prometheus and Grafana, reducing incident response time by 70%
Developed responsive web applications using React and TypeScript, improving user engagement metrics by 45%
Collaborated with UX team to implement accessibility features compliant with WCAG 2.1 standards, expanding user base by 15%
Built full-stack application using React frontend and Django REST API backend, processing 500GB+ of sales data daily
Implemented machine learning recommendation engine using scikit-learn and pandas, increasing conversion rates by 28%
Deployed on AWS using ECS, RDS, and CloudFormation with auto-scaling capabilities supporting 10,000+ concurrent sessions
Created CI/CD pipeline automation tools using Python, Docker, and Jenkins, reducing deployment cycles from 4 hours to 15 minutes
Developed infrastructure-as-code templates with Terraform and Ansible, enabling consistent environment provisioning across 50+ services
